activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

content.sentence: You _____ check the circuit breaker rating before energising the panel.
You _____ ignore overheating cables during inspection.
There isn’t much _____ left in the backup battery.
How many _____ were replaced during the maintenance work?
This transformer is _____ than the previous model.
A digital multimetre is _____ than an analogue tester.
This is the _____ generator in the power station.
It is the _____ protection system we currently use.
The motor operates _____ after proper lubrication.
After training, she will _____ install three-phase wiring independently.
The voltage fluctuation _____ indicate a faulty regulator.
The damaged cables _____ during the last inspection.
The grounding system _____ for electrical safety.

activity_2_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

dialogues.text_b: That doesn’t sound good. Did you finish the maintenance shift late last night?
dialogues.text_c: Yes, I stayed until almost midnight to complete the calibration.
dialogues.text_d: You should get some rest, switch off your phone, and hydrate properly.

dialogues.text_a: What software package would you like to install for data analysis?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure which one to choose. What do you recommend?
dialogues.text_c: I strongly recommend the upgraded version. Most users say it’s more reliable.
dialogues.text_d: Alright then. Can you install the upgraded version for me, please?

dialogues.text_a: Do you know why the system is running slower today?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not sure. It may be due to high network traffic, or it might be because the server is overloaded. We will only know for certain if we run a diagnostic test.

dialogues.text_a: I reviewed the new safety protocol yesterday.
dialogues.text_b: Good. I thought the previous version was complicated.
dialogues.text_c: That’s true—but the updated protocol is even more detailed.

dialogues.text_a: What do you think of this troubleshooting task?
dialogues.text_b: I think it is extremely challenging.
dialogues.text_c: I agree. In fact, it is the most challenging task we have ever completed.

dialogues.text_a: This technical specification looks more comprehensive than the previous one; it must be quite thorough.
dialogues.text_b: Yes, it is. In fact, it is the most thorough document in the entire project file.

dialogues.text_a: Did I configure the control panel correctly?
dialogues.text_c: Oh? What did I do wrong?

dialogues.text_a: Was Meena able to complete the system upgrade yesterday?
dialogues.text_b: No, she wasn’t. The installation process took longer than expected.

dialogues.text_a: When was this advanced monitoring device installed?
dialogues.text_b: I’m not entirely sure. I think it was installed earlier this year.

activity_a.text:
Drag and drop the following verbs into the correct number of the box as you hear the audio, played twice, giving the definition of the verb.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. ක්‍රියා පදයේ අර්ථය දක්වන පටිගත කිරීම ඇසීමත් සමඟ පහත ක්‍රියා පදයන් නිවැරදි කොටසේ ඇද දැමීමට උත්සාහ කරන්න.
இரண்டு முறை ஒலிக்கப்படும் ஒலிப்பதிவைக் கேட்டு, அதில் சொல்லப்படும் வினைச்சொற்களின் விளக்கங்களுக்கு ஏற்ப, அந்த வினைச்சொற்களைச் சரியான எண்கள் கொண்ட பெட்டிகளுடன் பொருத்துக.

content.text: to identify the precise cause of an electrical or technical malfunction in a circuit, machine, or system.
to systematically examine electrical equipment or a system to detect and resolve faults.
to completely dismantle, inspect, repair, and reassemble a major electrical unit such as a motor, generator, or control panel.
to restore a worn or damaged electrical component to efficient working condition.
to fasten electrical terminals, bolts, or connections to a specified standard to ensure safe and stable operation.
to remove air, moisture, or contaminants from an electrical or cooling system to maintain proper performance.
to thoroughly examine components for signs of overheating, corrosion, loose connections, or insulation failure.
to correct or repair a detected electrical fault or technical defect.
to accurately fit and secure electrical parts to form a functional unit or system.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_d.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

Questions.question: What can you say about the applicant’s progress at PowerLine Engineering?
Questions.answer: She moved from supervised work to handling small installation tasks alone.
options: She worked independently from the beginning.
She moved from supervised work to handling small installation tasks alone.
She only assisted senior engineers throughout her employment.

Questions.question: Why did she leave her previous job?
Questions.answer: She wanted a place with advanced automated systems.
options: She was dissatisfied with her salary.
She wanted to change industries completely.
She wanted a place with advanced automated systems.

Questions.question: What can you say about her experience with fully automated electrical control systems?
Questions.answer: She has some experience but not full responsibility.
options: She has extensive experience operating them independently.
She has some experience but not full responsibility.
She has never worked with any automated systems before.

Questions.question: Why did the applicant say she could not start immediately?
Questions.answer: She is required to give formal notice to her current employer before leaving.
options: She needs time to complete an advanced certification.
She is required to give formal notice to her current employer before leaving.
She has not yet decided whether to accept the position.

Questions.question: Based on her career goal, what direction is she aiming for?
Questions.answer: Specialisation in automated control and power management systems.
options: Specialisation in automated control and power management systems.

activity_b.text: I handled circuit installation, panel wiring, and basic PLC programming.
I also assisted senior engineers with automated load testing and power distribution analysis.
For the first six months, I worked mainly under supervision, but later I managed small installation tasks independently.
I completed a six-month internship from July 2021 to December 2021 at Metro Electrical Systems.
During that period, I gained hands-on experience with motor control circuits and digital fault-detection instruments.
I left because I was looking for better career growth.
The company handled small-scale electrical projects, and there were limited opportunities to work with advanced automated systems.
I would like to expand my skills in a more modern organisation like yours.
Not fully automated, but I have assisted in facilities where digital monitoring systems and automated inventory management software were used.
I would need to give two weeks’ notice to my current employer.
After that, I can start immediately.
However, I am open to discussion depending on the responsibilities and training opportunities.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.

Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Watch the video.
වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.
